evaluation.comments: Manual content review only: inspected local ignored model output, prompt trace, provider response metadata, and source excerpt for source grounding, source-span precision, whether exact/approximate labels are warranted, research usefulness, hallucination / unsupported claims, abstraction quality, negative-result value, comparison value against long_context_judgment_live_pilot_001, comparison value against chunked_source_grounding_live_pilot_001, and comparison value against chunked_source_grounding_live_pilot_002. The artifact is content-reviewable: it is complete parseable JSON, source-span precision improved relative to chunked_source_grounding_live_pilot_002, exact labels are supported by direct source phrasing, approximate labels are honestly marked where the hint omits the full subject, and no unsupported-claim report was needed for the narrow claims reviewed. Caveats: it still lacks canonical offsets, the contract keeps limited broader judgment abstraction, and the support labels remain proposal-only review findings rather than validation. Raw source text and raw model output are not committed. This review is not validation, product evidence, strategy evidence, financial advice, live-trading authority, graduation, or architecture.
